ready_to_use.name: Sesame Seeds
ready_to_use.prep: toasted and pulsed in coffee grinder until coarse

knife_work.name: Cauliflower
knife_work.prep: chopped into small florets for quick sautéing

steps.action_description: Dice onion, peppers, and cauliflower small. Thinly slice the partially frozen steak *across the grain* into short strips. Toast sesame seeds in the skillet until fragrant, then pulse them in the coffee grinder until they form a coarse, nutty powder.

Heat a heavy skillet until very hot. Add oil and butter, then sear steak strips in a single layer until browned (about 1-2 mins per side). Remove from pan and set aside. PULL: Set aside plain steak strips for kids.

In the same skillet, sauté onion and peppers for 5 mins. Add cauliflower florets, garlic, and cumin. Deglaze with bouillon (or a splash of water), cover, and steam for 5-8 mins until cauliflower is tender but not mushy. PULL: Set aside plain cauliflower for kids.

meanwhile.action: mix with lime juice and ground sesame seeds

steps.action_description: Lower heat to medium-low. Return seared steak to the skillet. Gently fold in the Greek yogurt/sesame mix, hemp hearts, and nigella seeds. Stir until a creamy, velvety sauce coats everything. Do not boil (to prevent yogurt from curdling).
Portion the creamy steak and cauliflower into bowls. Top each bowl with a heavy hit of the Freezer Seed Mix for extra crunch and fiber. Finish with remaining Aleppo pepper for a smoky kick.
